name: Tessian
description: Tessian — Email data loss prevention platform using ML to detect misdirected emails and accidental data leakage.

seo.title: Tessian — Security Scanning / Mobile App Sec
seo.meta_description: Tessian: Tessian — Email data loss prevention platform using ML to detect misdirected emails and accidental data leakage.

when_to_use: Misdirected email prevention via ML recipient anomaly detection
Data exfiltration detection for departing employee DLP
PHI and PII accidental disclosure prevention in email
Sensitive attachment blocking for HIPAA email compliance
Insider threat detection via email behavioral analysis

pros: Strong DLP signal beyond traditional keyword rules
Educational user prompts reduce repeat mistakes
Good reporting for regulated industry DLP audits
cons: Acquired by Proofpoint, product roadmap uncertain
ML baselines take time to tune effectively
Overlap with newer email security incumbents
review.verdict: Clever accidental-leakage detection, but post-Proofpoint acquisition the independent product story is fading.
review.best_for: Regulated firms (legal, finance) worried about outbound email DLP and misdirection.
review.not_for: Buyers wanting a long-term independent vendor or those focused on inbound phishing primarily.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact sales — no explicit peak-lock evidence

lock_in.reason: Email DLP deeply integrated with mail
